# Data Safe

Manage OCI Data Safe resources from Kubernetes with a generatedruntime staging baseline.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `datasafe` |
| Support Status | Preview |
| Latest Released Version | `Not yet released` |

| Bundle Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-datasafe-bundle:<version>` |
| Setup Guide | [Open guide](../../../installation.md) |
